headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -66.0)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 77% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 145 quotes and 112 at strong intensity, driving a score of 88.7 — people are venting hard today.
• This is well above the historical baseline, though still in the lower half of the 186-day range (max 171.6).
• Optimism recovered noticeably from yesterday's low (-39.8 to -12.0), while Fears edged slightly deeper into negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
